channel.title: Compressive Behavior on Antonio P. Sberna
channel.description: Recent content in Compressive Behavior on Antonio P. Sberna

item.title: Enhanced Compressive Performance and Energy Absorption in SLM-Fabricated 316L Arrowhead Auxetics via Tendon and Stuffer Geometry Modification
item.description: Geometric optimization of 3D-printed auxetic arrowhead structures for superior mechanical performance.
